title: Arweave Network Info
description: Current network state and node information returned by GET /info.

height.description: Current block height of the weave

current.description: Independent hash (indep_hash) of the current tip block

blocks.description: Total number of blocks in the weave

queue_length.description: Number of transactions queued for processing

node_state_latency.description: Node state processing latency in milliseconds
